differential_diagnoses: Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS) syndrome
next_steps: Perform immediate isolation (airborne and contact precautions)
Obtain VZV and HSV PCR from skin lesion swabs (unroofing vesicles)
Perform diagnostic punch biopsy for histology and immunohistochemistry
Obtain HIV testing and CD4 count
Initiate empiric systemic antiviral therapy (e.g., intravenous acyclovir)
